name: Become the best tamer
description:
Be the best tamer there are in this world

Here are some mechanics

Nets

Common net - has a 80% chance to break

Rare net - has a 55% chance to break

Epic net - has a 40% chance to break

Mythical net - has a 20% chance to break

Note - the more rarer the creature the harder it gets to capture it

There are also mutation on creatures it makes them stronger and has a different appearance of their species

There are locations places you can explore you can see them in the map

Each species has there own special skills and if you lucky enough you can find a creature's egg

You can get money from killing or capturing a creature and also you can make your creature fight in a area for money

You can use money to buy armour, nets, baits, and equipment

Hospital - the hospital is the most important place, you can heal your pets here for free
creator: Four eyes
